name: Memphis
author: rslurry
description:
```markdown
Uses 2023 LODES data for the Memphis area.
Includes demand for MEM airport; the University of Memphis; FedExForum Arena, Southland Casino, Beale Street (split into 4 spots; average of annual tourism data), and the South Main Arts District (split into 3 spots; a guesstimate of demand based on tourism data).
```
